The '''Nebula Orchid''' was a popular diner in [[Kuat City]] on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. [[Reck Desh]] was at the Nebula Orchid when he learned from an [[unknown telbun]] the location of [[Elan]] and [[Vergere]].

{{Struct-stub}}
